### Added

- **Manual Sizing Estimator**: New provider for estimating UDDI token requirements without scanning live infrastructure. Enter approximate counts (active IPs, DHCP %, sites, networks/site) and toggle services (IPAM, DNS, DHCP, protocol/lease logging) to compute management tokens, reporting tokens, and server tokens from the official Infoblox sizing formulas.
- **Per-server sizing**: Add individual server entries with form factor (NIOS-X or XaaS), QPS, LPS, and object counts. Auto-determines the correct tier and computes SERV-500 packs per appliance.
- **Per-destination reporting tokens**: Reporting token calculation broken out by destination (CSP, S3, Ecosystem, Local Syslog) with independent toggles and per-destination token rates. Ecosystem defaults to 40% of monthly log volume.
- **BOM panel**: Bill of Materials summary showing MGMT-1000, SERV-500, and REPORTING-40 pack counts with a Copy BOM button. Growth buffer (default 20%) applied to management and reporting tokens.
- **Validation warnings**: Non-blocking advisory banners for edge-case inputs (zero growth buffer, assets exceeding active IPs, logging without server entries, etc.).
- **Field tooltips**: Spreadsheet-sourced descriptions on all estimator inputs, BOM SKUs, and growth buffer fields.
- **Disc Assets in tier readout**: Per-server tier readout now shows disc asset capacity alongside tokens.

### Improved

- **Inline count editing**: Findings table count column shows "Count (editable)" header, dashed underline, pencil icon, and a tip banner to improve discoverability of manual overrides.
- **NIOS Grid icon**: Manual Sizing Estimator provider card uses the NIOS Grid icon instead of the generic placeholder.

### Fixed

- **WinRM HTTPS toggle**: AD authentication credentials step now includes an HTTPS toggle with a security warning when disabled.
- **AD DC metrics**: Added missing `activeIPCount` to all AD domain controller `NiosServerMetrics` objects.

### Upgrade

```bash
brew update && brew upgrade uddi-token-calculator
# or
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stefanriegel/UDDI-Token-Calculator/main/install.sh | bash
```

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stefanriegel/UDDI-Token-Calculator/compare/v2.4.0...v2.5.0
